title: xali's Enchanted Books - Create Addon
description: Adds unique textures for enchanted books in create mod and create addons
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af5ceb333f0519ec3fd2aef682dd271325823224.png)

# xali's Enchanted Books - Create Addon

[xali's Enchanted Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enchanted-books) adds unique textures to vanilla and some popular mods enchanted books. However, the great players of the Create mod have long been faced with the most ordinary textures of enchanted books added by this mod.

But now... by installing this resource pack, every book added by the Create mod (and some Create add-ons) will have its own unique texture that fits into the rest of xali's Enchanted Books

## Supported Enchants

### Create
- All as of 6.x

### Create Stuff 'N Additions
- Chunk Eater (max level: 5)
- Impact (max level: 3)
- Digging
- Gravity Gun
- HellFire

# Requirement
As original xali's Enchanted Books. For 1.21.1 and under, one of the following mod is required for this pack to work properly:
- **[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)**
- **[CIT Resewn (for fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions)** or **[Forge cit (for forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forge-cit/files/4748346/changelog)**
- **[EnchantedBookEnabler](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantedbookenabler-datapack)**
